Aerial Studio · Dronography

Stories from Above

Precision aerial photography and cinematic drone video for weddings, estates, and landscapes, elevating every frame with a bird's-eye narrative.

Book Aerial Session Explore Capabilities
4K Aerial Stills & Video
Smooth Cinematic Flight
Safety-First Operation
Sri Lanka Wide Coverage
Signature craft

Flight-ready artistry for unforgettable days

From intimate ring reveals to sweeping venue orbits, our drone work is directed like a film unit — quiet on set, precise in the air, and finished with the same editorial grade as our portraiture.

  • Licensed & insured operation
  • Wedding-day discrete flight
  • Stills + 4K motion packages

Platform

DJI · Cinematic Aerial

What We Capture

Dronography for every altitude of your story

Aerial stills and motion designed to pair with our ground photography — one cohesive visual language from the aisle to the horizon.

Wedding Aerials

Sweeping ceremony reveals, couple portraits from altitude, and cinematic venue flyovers that place your day in the landscape.

Property & Estates

Clean, high-resolution exterior and estate sequences for listings, hotels, and architectural showcases.

Landscapes & Travel

Dramatic coastlines, hill country, and destination stories captured with stable flight and editorial colour.

Cinematic Video

Smooth tracking shots, orbit reveals, and altitude transitions designed for films, reels, and highlight edits.

How It Works

From brief to skyline

01

Brief & Location

We map your venue, wind windows, and the shots that matter most — from first kiss reveals to estate flyovers.

02

Flight Plan

Safe flight paths, altitude, and composition are planned so every pass feels intentional, never improvised.

03

Capture Day

Quiet, precise operation with dual attention to ground moments and the sky — timed around golden light when possible.

04

Edit & Deliver

Cinematic grade, stabilised sequences, and stills curated into a gallery that matches our portrait work.

Why Aerial Matters

Context, scale, and emotion only the sky can give

A single overhead frame can show the full geometry of a ceremony, the coastline holding your resort, or the estate that becomes your forever home. We treat altitude as another lens in the story — not a gimmick.

4K+

Resolution ready

Safe

Flight protocols

Same day

Sneak peeks available

Matched

Colour to studio work

Ground + sky

One continuous visual story

Ideal for

Weddings · Resorts · Real estate · Events · Destination films

Ready to take flight

Book your aerial session

Tell us the date, location, and the shots you imagine. We'll plan a safe flight path and craft a sky-level chapter for your gallery.
